title.rendered: [Free Webinar] How Nonprofits Can Overcome the Challenges of Disconnected Fundraising Software

content.rendered:
Date: Tuesday, June 27, 2023
Time: 1 pm ET / 10 am PT (1 hour)
Cost: Free
Presented by:
Michelle Kocin, Digital Marketing Manager at Sylogist
Chris Stevenson, Director of Sales at Sylogist

Join Sylogist to learn how nonprofits can overcome the challenges caused by using disconnected fundraising, CRM, and fund accounting software systems. In this free webinar, we will:

  • Discuss the challenges that arise from using disconnected software systems including the cost to maintain, inaccurate data, and the extensive staff time required to administer.
  • Review how nonprofits are using connected platforms to streamline and simplify their fundraising to finance operations.
  • Present best practices for connecting fundraising, CRM, and fund accounting software.
  • Demonstrate the advantages of end-to-end fundraising to finance solutions.

<<Register Now>>

Please Note: This webinar will be recorded. If you can not attend the webinar live, please register and you will be sent a link to the recording 24-48 hours after the webinar is over. Also, visit GoToWebinar’s Attendee System Check for information on how to join and attend this webinar.
